title: ctenitis lasiernos
intro: Ctenitis lasiernos, also known as fern tree, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ctenitis genus. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis lasiernos include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or infusing the leaves in oils to create topical remedies.
